demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My gums started bleeding heavily this afternoon for no reason, and I've felt completely drained and feverish for the last few days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The gum bleeding just won't stop and I feel awful and weak — I'm worried because I live on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: profound tiredness has been creeping up over the past week; a high fever and sore throat started about three days ago; the gum bleeding began this afternoon out of nowhere
symptom_narrative.duration: the bleeding has been going for a few hours and hasn't stopped
symptom_narrative.character: the gums are oozing blood continuously without me brushing or knocking them; I feel wiped out and hot and shivery
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I feel completely drained, like I can barely get out of the chair
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: bleeding from the gums; a dull aching in the middle of my chest bone; spots and bruises on my lower legs
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the tiredness and fever have built up over days; the bleeding came on suddenly today and is constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing seems to help — pressing on the gums slows it a little
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps oozing on its own
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: fever, sore throat, extreme tiredness, a dull ache in the breastbone, and little red spots and bruises appearing on my legs
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: too weak to do much; resting in a chair because standing makes me feel faint

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; no one else at home to help or keep an eye on the bleeding

access_barriers.other: lives alone with no one present — cannot be observed if the bleeding worsens or a faint occurs

objective_data_offered.value: around 38.2 degrees on a home thermometer earlier today
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home thermometer reading reported by the patient; any clinician-measured temperature is not available in this telehealth encounter

objective_data_offered.value: gums are visibly oozing blood; the patient looks very pale
scattered pinpoint red spots and larger bruises over both lower legs, and a couple of raised purple patches on the left forearm
heart feels like it is racing and pounding; feels faint when standing up
